channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: Scorecard: Australia vs England, Women's T20 World Cup final
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Latest score from the Women's T20 World Cup final between Australia and England at Lord's. Watch for FREE on Sky Sports' digital platforms.

item.description:
Ondo North Senator Olajide Ipinsagba calls on aggrieved APC members in Ondo State to embrace reconciliation and unity for the 2027 general election.

item.title: Oyo Police Recover Stolen Vehicle, Arrest Three Over Theft, Receiving Stolen Property
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The Oyo State Police Command has recovered a stolen vehicle and arrested three suspects in connection with its theft and the receipt of stolen property. According to the Police Public Relations Officer, CSP Adewale Osifeso, one Mr. Reuben Adebayo, 55, a resident of Akobo, Ibadan, reported on July 3,

item.title: FG Denies Missing N8.8trn, Says IMF Report Misrepresented
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The Federal Government has dismissed claims that about N8.8 trillion in public expenditure is missing or unaccounted for, insisting that all spending was properly recorded and disclosed through official budget implementation processes.   The clarification followed reports citing the Inte

item.title: Customs, Afreximbank deepen partnership to boost cross-border trade

item.description: By Godwin Oritse ABUJA — The Nigeria Customs Service (NCS) and the African Export-Import Bank (Afreximbank) have reaffirmed their commitment to strengthening cooperation aimed at promoting seamless cross-border trade and accelerating the implementation of the African Continental Free Trade Area (AfC

item.title: Full List: Countries That Won Back-To-Back FIFA World Cup
item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: Winning the FIFA World Cup is regarded as the pinnacle of international football, but successfully defending the title has proven to be one of the sport’s rarest achievements. In nearly a century of World Cup history, only two countries – Italy and Brazil – have retained the men&#8

item.title: Kwara 2027: APC ‘Thanksgiving Walk’ Signals Unity, Readiness – Alakawa
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The ‘Thanksgiving Road Walk’ organised by the Kwara State chapter of the All Progressives Congress (APC) on Sunday in Ilorin, the state capital, witnessed a large turnout of party faithful, including party chieftains, women’s groups, youth groups and other supporters. The event was

item.title: Court Remands Akwa Ibom PDP Spokesman Over Alleged Defamation
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The Chief Magistrate Court sitting in Uyo has remanded the Akwa Ibom State Publicity Secretary of the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP), Barr. Ewa Okpo, over alleged defamation of former senator representing Uyo Senatorial District, Barr. Effiong Bob, with the matter now transferred to the Federal High

item.title: PDP Demands Probe Of ‘Gbajagate’, Alleges Institutional Failure
item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: The faction of the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) under the leadership of Mr Kabiru Turaki, SAN, has called for an independent forensic investigation into the alleged funding of a “fake” federal agency. Specifically, the faction called for an investigation of theallegations of involvemen

item.title: Court Term Reflects Reagan, Not Trump, Priorities
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Bloomberg Supreme Court reporter Greg Stohr says the court's latest term largely advanced long-standing conservative legal priorities rooted in the Reagan era, while rejecting several Trump-specific initiatives, including broad tariff powers. Joining David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg Thi

item.title: Infuriating Google commercial imagines the founding fathers embracing AI
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: "Group project, but make it 1776." That's how a new commercial for Google Workspace opens. And things only get cringier from there. The clip imagines what it would be like if the founding fathers turned to Google's collaboration tools and Gemini to help them draft the Declaration of Independence. Be

item.title: Ballon d’Or Organisers Say Non-European Based Players Can Win Award
item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: Ballon d’Or organisers have insisted that footballers do not need to play for European clubs to win the prestigious individual award, maintaining that players from any league in the world remain eligible despite Europe’s historical dominance. Addressing the long-running debate as the rac

item.title: Police beg Cross River communities to halt hostilities after gunshots kill 1, injure several
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The Cross River State command of the Nigeria Police have asked the Egbor and Orugbam communities of Biase LGA to refrain from further hostility and bloodshed following the killing of one Mr Nkereuwem Okoh in his farm in Orugbam and injuring several others on Saturday. A statement from the command re

item.title: BREAKING: NNPCL reduces fuel price for second time in less than two weeks
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The Nigerian National Petroleum Company Limited has reduced its premium motor spirit pump price for the second time in less than two weeks.A market survey by DAILY POST on Sunday showed that the state-owned filling station has adjusted its petrol price to N1,150 per litre down from N1,210. The lates

item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: The Socio-Economic Rights and Accountability Project (SERAP) has asked the leadership of the National Assembly to disclose documents relating to the approval of over N1.3bn allocated to what the Presidency has described as a non-existent presidential council in the 2026 Appropriation Act. In a Freed

item.description: The leadership of the All Progressives Congress (APC) youth wing in the Ekiti Local Government Area of Kwara State has formally endorsed Hon. Olawuyi... The post Ekiti APC youths endorse Rep Ajuloopin for third term appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: The Cross River State Police Command has confirmed the killing of a farmer and the injury of another after unknown gunmen attacked them on their farmland in Erei Community, Biase Local Government Area. In a statement issued on Sunday, the command’s spokesperson, ASP Eitokpah Sunday Akata, said

Olatunbosun Oyintiloye, has commended the Federal Government’s comprehensive reform of the National Youth Service Corps (NYSC), describing it as a bold initiative to reposition the scheme as a skills-driven platform for youth empowerment and n

item.description: England face Mexico in the last 16 of the World Cup in Mexico City - Thomas Tuchel could change tactics to combat the hosts and the altitude to book a place in the quarter finals.

item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Security has been stepped up around Niger’s Presidential Palace in Niamey following reports of unrest involving some members of the country’s armed forces, according to security sources. The sources, quoted by security reporter Zagazola Makama on X, said the Presidential Guard, backed by

item.dc:creator: TVC News

item.title: International exchange programmes: the reality behind the promises
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: We decided to conduct our own investigation and check the information about different international programmes: what are the real living conditions, where promises of mountains of gold turn out to be just talk, and where people are genuinely taken care of. We looked into reviews and spoke to partici

item.title: The Sourdough Sidekick automates the boring bit of baking
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: Baking sourdough bread is inherently old-fashioned, relying on natural fermentation and wild yeast instead of the simple, predictable commercial stuff. So it might sound anathema to bring a gadget into the mix. The trick to the Sourdough Sidekick - backed and branded by King Arthur flour - is that i

item.title: I have no kids. Will I cause family drama by leaving different amounts to my nieces and nephews?
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: “Part of me would prefer to leave more to those for whom the money could make a meaningful difference.”

item.title: D’Tigers Crush Rwanda 106-62, Reach World Cup Qualifiers Second Round
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: Nigeria’s senior men’s basketball team, D’Tigers, sealed qualification for the second round of the FIBA Basketball World Cup African Qualifiers after a dominant 106-62 victory over Rwanda on Sunday. The convincing win completed a perfect three-game qualifying window for Nigeria, fo

item.title: Bandits kill nine farmers, abduct many in Kaduna attacks
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: Armed bandits launched a brutal attack on local communities, leaving at least nine farmers dead and abducting an unspecified number. The post Bandits kill nine farmers, abduct many in Kaduna attacks appeared first on Premium Times Nigeria.

item.dc:creator: New Telegraph

item.title: Rainstorm Wreaks Havoc In Jigawa, Damages Over 200 Buildings
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: Over 200 buildings have been damaged following a heavy downpour and powerful windstorm that hit Dutse, the Jigawa State capital, on Saturday. The rainfall, which began at about 8:00 a.m. and lasted for more than an hour, flooded several parts of the city, destroying homes, schools, markets, places o

item.title: Ballon d’Or: Any player, outside Europe, can win the award – Organisers

item.title: Imo Police impound over 25 vehicles with covered number plates
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: By Chidi Nkwopara OWERRI — The Imo State Police Command has impounded more than 25 vehicles found with covered, obscured or missing registration plate numbers as part of an enforcement campaign aimed at improving public safety and tackling crime. Commissioner of Police, Audu Garba Bosso, disclosed t

item.title: How Keurig saved — and ruined — your coffee
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: Before Keurig, the coffee in your office was almost certainly terrible. Old, burned, made by someone who would rather poorly eyeball than properly measure. Just altogether gross. After Keurig? You could make your own coffee, a cup at a time, exactly when you needed it. The single-cup brewer was an e

item.title: Police foil suspected bandit attack in Sokoto, kill one attacker
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Police in Sokoto State have foiled a suspected bandit attack on Daraye village in Wamako Local Government Area, killing one suspected attacker and recovering an AK-47 rifle with live ammunition. The operation took place in the early hours of Saturday after security agencies received a distress call

item.title: Kano govt executes 1,508 development projects worth N928bn — Commissioner

item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: By Steve Oko UMUAHIA — A middle-aged man was arrested on Sunday for allegedly attempting to steal a vehicle parked outside the Assemblies of God Church on Item Street, Umuahia, Abia State. The incident occurred barely a month after a Toyota Sienna belonging to the wife of a traditional ruler, HRH Ez

item.title: ‘Creating state police will not be additional burden’ – Zamfara govt
item.dc:creator: Daily Post

Through heartfelt reflections and sincere invitations to reconnect, the song portrays the singers as emotionally invested in a relationship that has weathered dis

item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: Nigeria has retained its position as Africa’s leading beneficiary of the European Union’s prestigious Erasmus Mundus Joint Master’s scholarship programme, with 89 students securing fully funded scholarships for postgraduate studies across Europe in 2026. item.dc:creator: Nairametrics

item.title: Gently Lyrics by Tekno
item.dc:creator: NotJustOk
item.description: Tekno Lyrics The lyrics of Gently by Tekno celebrate love, emotional vulnerability, and the desire for a caring and supportive relationship. Through heartfelt expressions of affection, the song portrays the singer as deeply devoted to a partner who brings him peace, happiness, and a sense of complet

item.dc:creator: Hacker News
item.description: Article URL: https://phosh.mobi/releases/rel-0.56.0/ Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48794179 Points: 53 # Comments: 6

item.title: SERAP demands probe over N1.3bn allocation to ‘non-existent’ presidential council
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The Socio-Economic Rights and Accountability Project, SERAP, has urged Senate President Godswill Akpabio and Speaker of the House of Representatives, Tajudeen Abbas, to explain the inclusion of over N1.3 billion in the 2026 Appropriation Act for a presidential council which the Presidency has report

item.title: New Iran Leader Absent As Other Sons Pay Respects To Khamenei
item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: Ali Khamenei ruled the Islamic republic from 1989 until he was killed aged 86 in an airstrike on the first day of the US-Israeli war with Iran on February 28. The post New Iran Leader Absent As Other Sons Pay Respects To Khamenei appeared first on Channels Television.

item.title: Absolute CHAOS! Best bits from a hilarious F1 Lego race
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Watch the best bits of the chaotic Lego parade at the British Grand Prix.

item.title: No One Can Please Woman – Funke Felix-Adejumo
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: Nigerian preacher and marriage counsellor, Reverend Funke Felix-Adejumo, has advised married men not to wear themselves out trying to satisfy their wives, declaring that no man can completely please a woman. Speaking during a sermon, the cleric urged husbands to remain responsible in their homes but

item.title: Troops nab two over attempted NIPSS attack as security probe deepens
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: The arrests come days after troops repelled an attempted attack on the strategic national institution on July 2, engaging suspected armed assailants in a gun battle that left one attacker dead while others escaped into nearby rocky terrain.

item.title: Kaduna: I won’t demolish property without compensation — Sani
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Kaduna Governor Uba Sani says affected property owners will receive compensation before any demolition linked to government projects. The post Kaduna: I won’t demolish property without compensation — Sani appeared first on The Sun Nigeria.

item.title: Atiku, Obi Demand Probe Into IMF’s ₦8.83tn Off-Budget Spending Report
item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: The opposition leaders called for investigations and also urged Nigerians to continue demanding greater transparency in the management of public resources. The post Atiku, Obi Demand Probe Into IMF’s ₦8.83tn Off-Budget Spending Report appeared first on Channels Television.

item.title: NYSC overhaul ’ll curb youth unemployment, drive empowerment — APC chieftain
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: A chieftain of the All Progressives Congress (APC), Mr Olatunbosun Oyintiloye, has commended the Federal Government’s comprehensive reform of the National Youth Service Corps (NYSC), describing it as a bold initiative to reposition the scheme as a skills-driven platform for youth empowerment and nat

Through heartfelt expressions and thoughtful acts of care, the song conveys the singer's desire to support, protect, and cherish a romantic partner, emphasiz

item.title: Nigeria condemns killing of two citizens in South Africa, warns of international action
item.dc:creator: BusinessDay
item.description: The Federal Government has strongly condemned the killing of two Nigerian nationals in South Africa, accusing South African security operatives read more Nigeria condemns killing of two citizens in South Africa, warns of international action

item.description: Members of the All Progressives Congress (APC) in Kwara State on Sunday held a rally to thank President Bola Tinubu and the leadership... The post 2027: APC holds ‘Kwara Ndupe’ rally to thank Tinubu, party leadership appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: FG denies spending N8tn outside budget, says claims misrepresent IMF report
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: By Innocent Anaba The Federal Government has dismissed claims that it spent over N8 trillion outside the approved budget, describing the allegation as false and a misrepresentation of the 2026 Article IV Consultation Report by the International Monetary Fund, IMF. The government said reports suggest

item.title: Transfer: Onana among top 10 highest-paid goalkeepers with loan move from Man Utd
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Andre Onana has entered the list of the top 10 highest-paid goalkeepers in the word following his loan move from Manchester United to Trabzonspor. The Cameroon international had spent last season on loan with the Turkish club. But this fresh agreement has seen his salary increased, according to foot

item.title: Ebonyi: 4,000 NDC members defect to PDP
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: No fewer than 4,000 NDC members have defected to the PDP in Ebonyi State ahead of the 2027 general election. The post Ebonyi: 4,000 NDC members defect to PDP appeared first on The Sun Nigeria.

item.title: Iran needs to 'normalise relations with the US somehow' to save economy, expert says
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: Iranian leaders joined prayers Sunday over the casket of late supreme leader Ali Khamenei during a second day of funeral ceremonies. Arash Azizi, contribuing writer at the Atlantic, said Iran needs to "normalise relations with the US somehow" as he pointed to the economy which is in tatters followin

item.title: Alibaba bans Claude for staff – Anthropic didn't want them using it anyway
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: Chinese tech giant Alibaba has ordered staff to stop using Anthropic's Claude Code, after it was found to be flagging users connecting from China. But Anthropic is already trying its best to stop Chinese firms from using Claude at all, and accuses Alibaba of running large "distillation" campaigns ag
